name: @lesto/live
description: Lesto local-first sync (ADR 0042 Tier 4) — the browser client: an in-memory keyed store, the GET /__lesto/live-data SSE consumer, and a framework-agnostic LiveQuery handle (subscribe/getSnapshot) that keeps an auth-scoped shape in sync. v0 = in-memory, online-only, resync-on-reconnect.
